data.title: Willis Launches Digital Infrastructure Protector: A Complete End-to-End Lifecycle Solution for Comprehensive Data Center Risk Management
data.description: Willis has introduced a new solution for data center clients that emphasizes a combination of comprehensive insurance coverage and personalized risk management assistance. This offering aims to enhance both operational and financial resilience for clients in the data center sector. Through this innovative approach, Willis is striving to provide maximum support and protection for businesses operating in the data center industry.

data.title: Turkcell makes a bold entry into the 5G era with new campaign featuring Shaquille O’Neal
data.description: The latest Turkcell campaign, starring basketball icon Shaquille O’Neal, showcases the unparalleled attributes of speed, capacity, and coverage. With O’Neal as the face of the campaign, Turkcell aims to emphasize its cutting-edge technology and service quality to the audience. This collaboration highlights Turkcell’s commitment to providing top-notch telecommunications services to its customers. The campaign is set to reach a wide audience, leveraging O’Neal's popularity and influence. This strategic partnership signals Turkcell's dedication to enhancing its brand image and expanding its market reach.

data.title: Bithumb seeks court's help to regain 7 BTC due to payout error in February; files for asset freeze.
data.description: Bithumb, a cryptocurrency exchange in South Korea, has requested a court-approved asset freeze in order to recover 7 Bitcoin that were mistakenly paid out in February. The exchange is taking legal measures to reclaim the remaining cryptocurrency from the error that occurred earlier this year.

data.title: Havencrest Completes Majority Recapitalization of OFFOR Health
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Dallas-headquartered healthcare private equity firm Havencrest Capital Management revealed its majority recapitalization of OFFOR Health, a prominent provider of office-based anesthesia services.
